description.initial: You enter a chamber filled with red crystals, their fiery glow making you feel as if you've stepped into the heart of a volcano. Despite the color, the temperature remains cool. Like the Blue Chamber, this room holds a pedestal with a color-coded tablet, the second of three.
description.return: The Red Chamber. The crimson crystals pulse with their warm light.
description.atmospheric: The red light creates dancing shadows on the walls, giving the chamber an almost living quality.

south.blockedMessage: The cave system ends here. Solid rock blocks your passage.

items.itemMessage: You drink the mineral water. It is cold and refreshing, tinted faintly red but perfectly safe.
You pick up the brightly glowing red crystal key.

interactables.name: Color Tablet
interactables.examineText: A tablet displays five glowing colors in sequence: Red, Red, Green, Blue, Yellow. Remember, you can only view each tablet once before the pattern changes.
interactables.interactionText: You memorize the pattern: Red, Red, Green, Blue, Yellow. The tablet pulses acknowledgment. You must not look again.

interactables.name: Crystal Cluster
interactables.examineText: Deep red crystals cluster together like frozen flames. Their internal glow seems to flicker, creating an illusion of actual fire.
